hero.title: Developer
hero.subtitle: Full Stack
hero.description: +3 years in Node.js with TypeScript building RESTful APIs

about.greeting_sub: I started my career three years ago.
about.p1: I build and maintain asynchronous RESTful APIs in Node.js with TypeScript. Fastify for modular and custom architecture, AdonisJS for distributed and integrated applications. Authentication with JWT and OAuth, security with CORS, CSRF and Rate Limiting, contract validation with Zod and robust serialization.
about.p2: On the data layer, I work with SQL and NoSQL — PostgreSQL, MySQL and MongoDB with Prisma ORM, migrations and seeds. Redis for caching and RabbitMQ for messaging.
about.p3: Reusable interfaces in Vue.js with Vue Router, Pinia for state, TanStack Query for async data and Tailwind CSS with component libraries like Shadcn and PrimeVue. Experience in SPA, SSR and SSG with focus on performance and SEO.
about.p4: Containerized environments with Docker and Docker Compose, CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, unit and integration tests with Jest and infrastructure on AWS with EC2 and Terraform.
about.status_title: Working on freelance and personal projects.
about.status_sub: Looking for opportunities as a Fullstack or Backend Developer.
about.v4_h1: Contributed to the development of a multi-tenant SaaS in Node.js/TypeScript and Vue.js, serving +100 users with Redis caching.
about.v4_h2: Refactored legacy Node.js (JavaScript) API to REST with Fastify (TypeScript) + Zod + Prisma ORM, reducing ~80% of validation errors and timeouts.
about.v4_h3: Maintained legacy corporate system in PHP 7/NGINX, eliminating bottlenecks and improving core application logic in production.
about.v4_h4: Implemented data ingestion with Python (Pandas, SQLAlchemy) for MySQL integration, ensuring consistency and eliminating duplicates.
about.capsul_h1: Participated in the migration of the core logistics system from Python/FastAPI to Node.js/Fastify, fixing request failures that caused order loss.
about.capsul_h2: Integrated sales platforms and carriers like Correios and Monetizze via APIs and Webhooks, mapping payloads for order consumption and dispatch.
about.capsul_h3: Developed internal ticket system with Aeria Lang (Node.js/Vue.js/MongoDB) and RabbitMQ messaging, centralizing communication between dev and support.
about.capsul_h4: Automated tests and operational processes with Python (Selenium, Pytest) in a 24/7 loop for checkout form validation.
about.capsul_h5: Implemented CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and Docker Compose, deploying via SSH on Linux with Terraform for AWS infrastructure.

projects.label: Portfolio
projects.title: Featured
projects.p1_desc: Multi-gateway payment API with automatic fallback, access roles and refund by origin gateway.
projects.p2_desc: Price monitoring microservice with dynamic scraping via Selenium, processing with Pandas and REST endpoints for price history and averages.
projects.p3_desc: Doom port running inside a PDF via JavaScript, C compiled with Emscripten to asm.js, rendered in ASCII via text fields.
projects.p4_desc: Robotic automation in Python controlling LEGO NXT motors and sensors for programmable movement.
